creator: nukama@gmail.com
text:
But libpci is detected correctly, when OPTION FTDI is enabled.

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130829204500-16068/
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130829210400-21395/ (with FTDI)

The Makefile isn't thread safe, so with MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE= yes
this is corrected, thanks to stefanct and idwer.

https://redports.org/buildarchive/20130829212801-18334/

Attached is a diff against the current version in ports.
